title: Sessions panel — flagship tile grid
description: Full sessions grid: filters (machine/status/workspace/search), sort (last-active default). Tile per spec mockup: status dot, ★ local, machine pill, workspace, cwd, AI summary, recent activities, msg count, sparkline, timestamps, tmux name, pid+tty (Q3), viewer count badge (Q5), [↗ jump]. Empty state with setup wizard CTA. 10+ component tests.

context.text: Implemented flagship dashboard sessions grid with filters, sorting, responsive tiles, local/remote jump states, detail dialog, restore endpoint hardening, component coverage, and self-contained Playwright E2E. Gates passed: npm test -- --runInBand (101 suites, 2435 passed, 5 skipped), npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run typecheck:dashboard, npm audit --audit-level=moderate, swift build, git diff --check, npm run test:e2e:dashboard. Screenshot proof: ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-010-sessions-panel-grid.png, ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-010-sessions-panel-dialog.png, ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-010-sessions-panel-mobile.png. Parallel reviews and Codex adversarial review completed with no remaining blockers.
